case_title: J. RAMON CAMPOZ VS. MARIO RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO JUL-31-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF J. RAMON CAMPOZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIO RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT REQUIRE A SPANISH INTERPRETER OF WHICH A REQUEST WAS NOT MADE PROPERLY AHEAD OF TIME AND THE INTERPRETER'S OFFICE WAS NOT ABLE TO PROVIDE ONE WHEN CONTACTED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LESLIE NICHOLS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY CAMPOZ, J. RAMON RAMIREZ, MARIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. 506 PLAINTIFF J. RAMON CAMPOZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER CRISTINA VISUS. DEFENDANT MARIO RAMIREZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER MICHELLE PERDUE #301687. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CAMPOZ, J. RAMON AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPOZ, J. RAMON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOZ, J. RAMON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
